languages.text: {n}Пламя занимается не сразу, словно портрет сопротивляется своей погибели. Лицо героя древности сначала покрывается растопленным слоем, словно взмокнув от ужаса, а затем кривится в злобной гримасе и проваливается внутрь.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Как гордый орел похож на древнего птеродактоида". {n}Вивисектор скромно улыбается и пожимает плечами.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The flames do not take hold immediately, as if the portrait were resisting its doom. The face of the ancient hero first becomes covered in a layer of melted paint, as if drenched in horror, and then curves in a malevolent snarl and collapses in on itself.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Пламя занимается не сразу, словно портрет сопротивляется своей погибели. Лицо героя древности сначала покрывается растопленным слоем, словно взмокнув от ужаса, а затем кривится в злобной гримасе и проваливается внутрь.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The flames do not take hold immediately, as if the portrait were resisting its doom. The face of the ancient hero first becomes covered in a layer of melted paint, as if drenched in horror, and then curves in a malevolent snarl and collapses in on itself.{/n}

{n}The flames do not take hold immediately, as if the portrait were resisting its doom. The face of the ancient hero first becomes covered in a layer of melted paint, as if drenched in horror, and then curves in a malevolent snarl and collapses in on itself.{/n}

{n}The flames do not take hold immediately, as if the portrait were resisting its doom. The face of the ancient hero first becomes covered in a layer of melted paint, as if drenched in horror, and then curves in a malevolent snarl and collapses in on itself.{/n}

languages.text: 炎はすぐには燃え広がらない。まるで肖像画が自らの破滅に抗っているかのように。古の英雄の顔は、まず恐怖にずぶ濡れになったかのように溶けた絵の具の層に覆われ、ついで口元が邪悪に歪み、やがて自らの内側へと崩れ落ちていく。
languages.original_text: {n}The flames do not take hold immediately, as if the portrait were resisting its doom. The face of the ancient hero first becomes covered in a layer of melted paint, as if drenched in horror, and then curves in a malevolent snarl and collapses in on itself.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 炎はすぐには燃え広がらない。まるで肖像画が自らの破滅に抗っているかのように。古の英雄の顔は、まず恐怖にずぶ濡れになったかのように溶けた絵の具の層に覆われ、ついで口元が邪悪に歪み、やがて自らの内側へと崩れ落ちていく。

languages.text: {n}Les flammes ne prennent pas immédiatement, comme si le portrait résistait à sa destruction. Une couche de peinture fondue commence à recouvrir le visage du héros de jadis, comme si elle le plongeait dans l'horreur, puis un rictus malveillant étire ses lèvres juste avant qu'il se déforme complètement.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The flames do not take hold immediately, as if the portrait were resisting its doom. The face of the ancient hero first becomes covered in a layer of melted paint, as if drenched in horror, and then curves in a malevolent snarl and collapses in on itself.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les flammes ne prennent pas immédiatement, comme si le portrait résistait à sa destruction. Une couche de peinture fondue commence à recouvrir le visage du héros de jadis, comme si elle le plongeait dans l'horreur, puis un rictus malveillant étire ses lèvres juste avant qu'il se déforme complètement.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Alevler, sanki portre kaderine direniyormuş gibi hemen tutuşmuyor. Kadim kahramanın yüzü; önce dehşet içinde sırılsıklam olmuşçasına erimiş bir boya tabakasıyla kaplanıyor, ardından kötü niyetli bir hırıltıyla bükülüyor ve kendi içine çöküyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The flames do not take hold immediately, as if the portrait were resisting its doom. The face of the ancient hero first becomes covered in a layer of melted paint, as if drenched in horror, and then curves in a malevolent snarl and collapses in on itself.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Alevler, sanki portre kaderine direniyormuş gibi hemen tutuşmuyor. Kadim kahramanın yüzü; önce dehşet içinde sırılsıklam olmuşçasına erimiş bir boya tabakasıyla kaplanıyor, ardından kötü niyetli bir hırıltıyla bükülüyor ve kendi içine çöküyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Flammen scheinen zu zögern, als würde sich das Porträt seiner Zerstörung widersetzen. Das Gesicht des alten Helden verschwindet unter geschmolzener Farbe, als würde es von Entsetzen gepackt, ehe es sich verzieht und schließlich in Flammen aufgeht.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The flames do not take hold immediately, as if the portrait were resisting its doom. The face of the ancient hero first becomes covered in a layer of melted paint, as if drenched in horror, and then curves in a malevolent snarl and collapses in on itself.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Flammen scheinen zu zögern, als würde sich das Porträt seiner Zerstörung widersetzen. Das Gesicht des alten Helden verschwindet unter geschmolzener Farbe, als würde es von Entsetzen gepackt, ehe es sich verzieht und schließlich in Flammen aufgeht.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Las llamas no prenden de inmediato, como si el retrato se resistiera a su final. El rostro del antiguo héroe se cubre primero de una capa de pintura derretida, como si sudara de pánico, y después se curva en un gruñido malévolo y se dobla sobre sí mismo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The flames do not take hold immediately, as if the portrait were resisting its doom. The face of the ancient hero first becomes covered in a layer of melted paint, as if drenched in horror, and then curves in a malevolent snarl and collapses in on itself.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Las llamas no prenden de inmediato, como si el retrato se resistiera a su final. El rostro del antiguo héroe se cubre primero de una capa de pintura derretida, como si sudara de pánico, y después se curva en un gruñido malévolo y se dobla sobre sí mismo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}火焰并未立刻蔓延，仿佛肖像在抗拒毁灭的命运。这位古代英雄的面孔先是覆盖上一层熔化的颜料，如同浸透恐惧，随后扭曲成恶毒的狞笑，继而坍陷下去。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The flames do not take hold immediately, as if the portrait were resisting its doom. The face of the ancient hero first becomes covered in a layer of melted paint, as if drenched in horror, and then curves in a malevolent snarl and collapses in on itself.{/n}
